description: Edits a function head with different whitespace layout and indentation

edits.search:
def greet(name) do
    IO.puts("Hello, " <> name <> "!")
  end
edits.replace:
def greet(name, prefix \\ "Hello") do
    IO.puts(prefix <> ", " <> name <> "!")
  end

description: Edits function definition using relaxed spaces around punctuation
Matches single quotes using double quotes in the search pattern
Edits code around comments and matches ignoring comments
Performs multiple non-contiguous edits atomically in Python

edits.search:
def sum_two_numbers(a, b):
    return a + b

def list_comprehension(items):
    return [ x * 2 for x in items if x is not None ]
edits.replace:
def list_comprehension(items):
    return [item * 3 for item in items if item is not None]

description: Fails when the search block is not found anywhere in the file
Fails when the search block is too short or generic and matches multiple spots
